title: Dataset v3 cloud balanced production corpus
description: Balanced multi-day cloud corpus for a larger production-style Online Boutique observability dataset without returning to the older 40-run local stress plan.

collection_strategy.why_batch_collection: Each four-run batch includes foundation, outage-heavy, restart/traffic, and latency/config plans so even a partial cloud run is diverse. The wrapper can resume without discarding completed runs.

plans.purpose: Broad foundation slice with baseline, outage, restart, degradation, and noisy near-miss coverage.
Service-diverse outage slice for dependency and user-visible impact separation.
Restart and traffic near-miss slice for outage-vs-restart and noise separation.
Latency and bad-configuration slice for symptom-vs-root-cause separation.
Second foundation repeat for run-to-run variation.
Second outage-heavy repeat for run-to-run variation.
Second restart/traffic repeat for run-to-run variation.
Second latency/config repeat for run-to-run variation.
Third foundation repeat for run-to-run variation.
Third outage-heavy repeat for run-to-run variation.
Third restart/traffic repeat for run-to-run variation.
Third latency/config repeat for run-to-run variation.
Fourth foundation repeat for a larger cloud dataset.
Fourth outage-heavy repeat for a larger cloud dataset.
Fourth restart/traffic repeat for a larger cloud dataset.
Fourth latency/config repeat for a larger cloud dataset.

benchmark_tracks.description: Pairs Jira issues against a global candidate pool across all cloud corpus runs.
Leaves whole dataset runs out to measure generalization across collection batches.
Uses logs, metrics, traces, alerts, and Kubernetes evidence without lab-only label leakage.

promotion_gates.raw_runs: Every collected run must pass validate-dataset-run.ps1 with 0 errors.
promotion_gates.derived_outputs: Every collected run should build ranking outputs with F1@1 and F1@3 present.
promotion_gates.aggregate_outputs: Corpus aggregate and holdout reports must include MRR, Recall@1, Recall@3, F1@1, F1@3, and nDCG@3.
promotion_gates.global_outputs: Build the global hard-negative dataset and first benchmark after all 16 runs complete.
promotion_gates.quality_review: Inspect failures before claiming model progress. Near misses and service-confusion errors are expected and useful.
